name: Food Storage and Preparation
description:
This building houses all the foodstuffs for the village.  Rows of bushel
baskets filled with dried vegetables and grains line the walls, while skinned
animals hang above them, collecting flies and who knows what else.  An area
near the rear of the building looks to be seignated as the prep area with a
hand pump for water and many different kinds of spices and seasonings on
shelves.
